title: Eva Unit 07
wikitext:
[]: Eva Unit 07...? [spoilers]             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 12:52 pm lf there was a eva unit 07 that would be nice!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Jan 10, 2009 1:24 pm Highly, highly probable that unit 7 is a Mass Pro. Eva model.. 'Nuf said.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 10, 2009 2:26 pm Rebuild stuff belongs in the Rebuild subforum please. Anyway, I'd say that 07 would be a Mass Production Eva, if Rebuild even has that (the ending could always have something completely different after all).

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 2:35 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Rebuild stuff belongs in the Rebuild subforum please. Anyway, I'd say that 07 would be a Mass Production Eva, if Rebuild even has that (the ending could always have something completely different after all).

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:18 pm eva unit05 wrote: eva-05 and eva-06 was rebuild so why not rebuild eva-07? :( :bigguns:

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jan 10, 2009 8:52 pm While the idea of Mass Produced Evangelion's done in Rebuild animation is a mouth watering proposition for this Eva fan.... I'd rather not see it. Too close to EOE for my tastes. I really just want to see Anno and crew follow through on their promise to deliver a completely NEW ending to Evangelion. When 4.0 starts I want there to be no scenes, lines of dialogue, or actions that can be seen as "Rebuilds" of old Eva concepts. As for Unit 07- nah. I mean maybe, just maybe if in Film 2.0 Glasses Girl is shown to be an Eva pilot but we don't get to see her eva yet- then it's possible. We;ll see.

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 9:10 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: While the idea of Mass Produced Evangelion's done in Rebuild animation is a mouth watering proposition for this Eva fan.... I'd rather not see it. Too close to EOE for my tastes. I really just want to see Anno and crew follow through on their promise to deliver a completely NEW ending to Evangelion. When 4.0 starts I want there to be no scenes, lines of dialogue, or actions that can be seen as "Rebuilds" of old Eva concepts. As for Unit 07- nah. I mean maybe, just maybe if in Film 2.0 Glasses Girl is shown to be an Eva pilot but we don't get to see her eva yet- then it's possible. We;ll see.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 10, 2009 9:21 pm We don't know who Mari is. For all we know, Eva-05 could maybe be an Evangelion for Rei instead of Eva-00 being repaired after the Operation Yashima battle.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 10, 2009 9:53 pm Seven different Evas is more than enough for 270 minutes' worth of film. There's no need for an eighth. Unless you belong to the merchandising department.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jan 11, 2009 5:34 pm I hold out hope that 3.0 and 4.0 will be split into two seperate 90 + minute films. That'd be nice. Bring them out 6 months apart and...well, a man can dream.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 11, 2009 6:53 pm I read somewhere awhile back that 3.0 and 4.0 are only 40 minutes each, similar to EoE. I can't remember the exact number, but I know for a fact that there was nothing about 3.0 AND 4.0 being 90 minutes each. (Probably because they'd be supposedly played back to back.) But, who knows at this point what the scheduling and film releases will entail.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jan 11, 2009 7:39 pm Yeah. The original talk was that the final two would be 45 minute features but that was back when the films were all supposed to come out within four months of each other. I.E.- Eva 1.0 in September '07, 2.0 in Winter '08, 3.0 + 4.0 in Summer '08. With all the constant delays (and re-imagining and concept expanding by Anno?) I only hope the idea of four 90 minute films becomes the new deal. 270 minutes can give a pretty decent action story with what needs to be told. But 360 minutes gives the characters room to breath and the chance to make something really special. So yeah, it's not news or anything, it's just this Eva Fanboys hopeful wish. Kinda like how the when Peter Jackson got the Lord of the Rings going at New Line it went from three 2 and a half hour films each to become two 3 hour epics and one 200 minute grand finale. (This is theatrical, not Extended) PS. Sorry for the off topicness. Back to Eva Unit 07- Until I officially hear of it, I won't even humor the idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Jan 15, 2009 4:02 pm I doubt we will see a Unit 07 since we already have Unit 05 and 06 coming. I think we will see Mass Produced Evangelion's in the 3rd movie then a Unit 07.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jan 15, 2009 4:16 pm I wouldn't mind watching two 90-min films back-to-back in the slightest. LOTR extended editions have trained me well...

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Fri Jan 16, 2009 5:30 pm It depends about what happens in the end. I can't really see a successful Seele "third" impact without the eva series... So maybe that plan will fail or just never happen, and we'll have a very different ending from what we've seen until now. The movies take so long to be released, I just hope the project won't end up being suddenly scrapped for some reasons.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jan 16, 2009 8:39 pm 2.5 hours would be fine too, especially for 2.0 with all the stuff that theyd have to leave out otherwise

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 26, 2009 5:52 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I read somewhere awhile back that 3.0 and 4.0 are only 40 minutes each, similar to EoE. I can't remember the exact number, but I know for a fact that there was nothing about 3.0 AND 4.0 being 90 minutes each. (Probably because they'd be supposedly played back to back.) But, who knows at this point what the scheduling and film releases will entail.
